WITH

set_a (molecule_id, element_count) AS (
        SELECT molecule_id, COUNT(DISTINCT element)
        FROM atom
        GROUP BY molecule_id
        HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT element) > 1
    ),
    set_b (molecule_id, element_count) AS (
        SELECT m.molecule_id, COUNT(DISTINCT a.element)
        FROM molecule m
        JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
        WHERE m.label IS NOT NULL
        GROUP BY m.molecule_id
    ),

unique_a (molecule_id, element_count, rn, density_rank) AS (
        SELECT
            molecule_id,
            element_count,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY molecule_id ORDER BY element_count) AS rn,
            DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY element_count DESC) AS density_rank
        FROM set_a
    ),
    unique_b (molecule_id, element_count, rn, density_rank) AS (
        SELECT
            molecule_id,
            element_count,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY molecule_id ORDER BY element_count) AS rn,
            DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY element_count DESC) AS density_rank
        FROM set_b
    ),

molecule_hierarchy AS (
        SELECT
            molecule_id,
            CONNECT_BY_ROOT molecule_id AS root_molecule,
            LEVEL AS hierarchy_level
        FROM molecule
        CONNECT BY PRIOR molecule_id = molecule_id
        START WITH label = '+'
    )
SELECT
    COUNT(CASE WHEN a.rn = b.rn AND a.density_rank = b.density_rank THEN 1 END) AS num_identical_in_a_and_b,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN a.molecule_id IS NULL THEN 1 END) AS num_not_identical_in_a,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN b.molecule_id IS NULL THEN 1 END) AS num_not_identical_in_b,
    LISTAGG(a.molecule_id, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY a.density_rank) AS matching_molecules,
    JSON_ARRAYAGG(
        JSON_OBJECT(
            'molecule' VALUE a.molecule_id,
            'rank' VALUE a.density_rank
        )
        ORDER BY b.density_rank
    ) AS molecule_json
FROM unique_a a
FULL OUTER JOIN unique_b b ON a.molecule_id = b.molecule_id AND a.rn = b.rn
LEFT JOIN molecule_hierarchy h ON a.molecule_id = h.molecule_id
WHERE
    EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM bond
        WHERE bond.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
        AND bond_id = 'TR011_2_24'
    )
AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM connected c
        JOIN atom a1 ON c.atom_id = a1.atom_id
        JOIN atom a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
        WHERE a1.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
        AND a1.element = a2.element
    )
GROUP BY
    GROUPING SETS (
        (a.density_rank, b.density_rank),
        ()
    )
HAVING
    COUNT(DISTINCT a.molecule_id) > (
        SELECT AVG(element_count)
        FROM set_a
    )

WITH match_times AS (
    SELECT
        "date",
        "match_api_id",
        TO_CHAR("date", 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS match_date_str,
        -- Calculate hour of day as a number (0-23.999...)
        TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR("date", 'HH24')) + 
        TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR("date", 'MI')) / 60 + 
        TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR("date", 'SS')) / 3600 AS hour_of_day
    FROM "Match"
),
target_times AS (
    SELECT 8 AS target_hour FROM DUAL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 20 AS target_hour FROM DUAL
),
distance_calc AS (
    SELECT
        mt."date",
        mt."match_api_id",
        mt.match_date_str,
        tt.target_hour,
        CASE
            WHEN tt.target_hour = 8 THEN 'morning'
            WHEN tt.target_hour = 20 THEN 'evening'
        END AS time_period,
        ABS(mt.hour_of_day - tt.target_hour) AS time_distance,
        DENSE_RANK() OVER (
            PARTITION BY mt.match_date_str, tt.target_hour
            ORDER BY ABS(mt.hour_of_day - tt.target_hour)
        ) AS time_rank
    FROM match_times mt
    CROSS JOIN target_times tt
)
SELECT
    TO_DATE(dc.match_date_str || ' ' ||
           LPAD(FLOOR(dc.target_hour), 2, '0') || ':00:00',
           'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS target_datetime,
    dc."date",
    dc."match_api_id",
    dc.time_period,
    dc.time_distance,
    dc.hour_of_day AS actual_hours,
    RANK() OVER (
        PARTITION BY dc.match_date_str, dc.time_period
        ORDER BY dc.time_distance, dc."match_api_id"
    ) AS final_rank
FROM distance_calc dc
WHERE dc.time_rank <= 1
  AND dc.time_distance <=
      CASE
          WHEN dc.target_hour = 8 THEN 4
          WHEN dc.target_hour = 20 THEN 3
      END
ORDER BY
    dc.match_date_str,
    dc.target_hour,
    dc.time_distance

WITH atom_stats AS (
    SELECT
        molecule_id,
        COUNT(*) AS atom_count,
        LISTAGG(element, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY atom_id) AS elements
    FROM atom
    GROUP BY molecule_id
),
molecule_json AS (
    SELECT 
        m.molecule_id,
        m.label,
        JSON_OBJECT(
            'molecule_id' VALUE m.molecule_id,
            'label' VALUE m.label,
            'atoms' VALUE (
                SELECT JSON_ARRAYAGG(
                    JSON_OBJECT(
                        'atom_id' VALUE a.atom_id,
                        'element' VALUE a.element
                    )
                    ORDER BY a.atom_id
                )
                FROM atom a
                WHERE a.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
            )
        ) AS molecule_data
    FROM molecule m
)
SELECT 
    m.molecule_id,
    m.label,
    a.atom_id,
    a.element,
    b.bond_id,
    b.bond_type,
    c.atom_id2,
    stats.atom_count,
    stats.elements,
    CASE 
        WHEN JSON_EXISTS(mj.molecule_data, '$.atoms[*]?(@.element == "cl")') THEN 'Contains Chlorine'
        ELSE 'No Chlorine'
    END AS contains_cl
FROM molecule m
INNER JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
INNER JOIN connected c ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id
LEFT JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
LEFT JOIN atom_stats stats ON m.molecule_id = stats.molecule_id
LEFT JOIN molecule_json mj ON m.molecule_id = mj.molecule_id
WHERE 
    (m.label IS NOT NULL OR EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 
        FROM atom a2 
        WHERE a2.molecule_id = m.molecule_id 
        GROUP BY a2.molecule_id 
        HAVING COUNT(*) > 3
    ))
    AND c.atom_id2 IN (
        SELECT a3.atom_id 
        FROM atom a3 
        WHERE a3.element = DECODE(a.element, 'cl', 'cl', 'h', 'o', 'o', 'h', a.element)
    )
ORDER BY 
    m.molecule_id,
    a.atom_id,
    b.bond_id

WITH molecule_atoms AS (

molecule_bonds AS (
    SELECT b.molecule_id,
           b.bond_id,
           b.bond_type,
           c.atom_id AS source_atom,
           c.atom_id2 AS target_atom,
           DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY b.molecule_id ORDER BY b.bond_id) AS bond_rank

atom_connections AS (

           mb.bond_type,
           CASE WHEN mb.source_atom = ma.atom_id OR mb.target_atom = ma.atom_id

    FROM molecule_atoms ma

    WHERE ma.molecule_id = mb.molecule_id
)

WITH "my_table" AS (
  SELECT 'A' AS "cto", 1 AS "nif", 'A1' AS "file_", 5 AS "filesize" FROM dual
  UNION ALL SELECT 'A', 1, 'A2', 3 FROM dual
  UNION ALL SELECT 'A', 2, 'A3', 2 FROM dual
  UNION ALL SELECT 'A', 2, 'A4', 1 FROM dual
  UNION ALL SELECT 'B', 1, 'B1', 4 FROM dual
  UNION ALL SELECT 'B', 1, 'B2', 6 FROM dual
)
SELECT "cto",
       "nif",
       "file_",
       "partition",
       "subpartition",
       "total_size"
FROM (
  SELECT t.*,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY "cto" ORDER BY "file_") AS "rn"
  FROM "my_table" t
) MATCH_RECOGNIZE (
  PARTITION BY "cto"
  ORDER BY "rn"
  MEASURES
    MATCH_NUMBER() AS "partition",
    FINAL COUNT(*) AS "subpartition",
    SUM("filesize") AS "total_size"
  ALL ROWS PER MATCH
  PATTERN (strt same_nif* diff_nif*)
  DEFINE
    same_nif AS "nif" = PREV("nif"),
    diff_nif AS "nif" != PREV("nif")
)
UNION ALL
SELECT 'A', 1, 'A1X', 1, 1, 5 FROM dual

   UNION ALL SELECT TO_DATE('19.02.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy')
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT TO_DATE('10.03.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy')
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT TO_DATE('12.03.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy')
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT TO_DATE('27.03.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy')
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT TO_DATE('10.04.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy')
   FROM dual),
     t2 AS
  (SELECT TO_CHAR(t.act_date, 'MON-yy') AS act_month,
          TO_CHAR(t.act_date, 'yyyymm') AS rn_2
   FROM tbl t
   GROUP BY TO_CHAR(t.act_date, 'MON-yy'),
            TO_CHAR(t.act_date, 'yyyymm')
   ORDER BY TO_CHAR(t.act_date, 'yyyymm')),
     grid AS
  (SELECT t1.activation_month,
          t1.rn_1,
          t2.act_month,
          t2.rn_2
   FROM
     (SELECT TO_CHAR(t.act_date, 'MON-yy') AS activation_month,
             TO_CHAR(t.act_date, 'yyyymm') AS rn_1
      FROM tbl t
      GROUP BY TO_CHAR(t.act_date, 'MON-yy'),
               TO_CHAR(t.act_date, 'yyyymm')
      ORDER BY TO_CHAR(t.act_date, 'yyyymm')) t1
   LEFT JOIN t2 ON (t1.rn_1 <= t2.rn_2)),
     molecule_activity AS
  (SELECT m."molecule_id",
          TO_CHAR(t.act_date, 'yyyymm') AS act_date
   FROM tbl t
   INNER JOIN "molecule" m ON m."molecule_id" IN
     (SELECT DISTINCT "molecule_id"
      FROM "bond"
      UNION SELECT DISTINCT "molecule_id"
      FROM "atom"))
SELECT g.activation_month,
       g.act_month,
       CASE
           WHEN g.rn_1 = g.rn_2 THEN
             (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ma."molecule_id")
              FROM molecule_activity ma
              WHERE ma.act_date = g.rn_1)
           ELSE
             (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ma."molecule_id")
              FROM molecule_activity ma
              WHERE ma.act_date BETWEEN g.rn_1 AND g.rn_2)
       END AS active_molecules
FROM grid g
ORDER BY g.rn_1,
         g.rn_2

WITH "credits" AS (
    SELECT
        5001 AS "ID",
        12 AS "ARTCRED",
        7.5 AS "BIZCRED",
        12 AS "HUMCRED",
        14 AS "NATCRED",
        11 AS "TEKCRED",
        9 AS "GENCRED",
        TO_DATE('01.01.2010', 'dd.mm.yyyy') AS "EFFECTIVE_DATE"
    FROM DUAL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
        5001 AS "ID",
        15 AS "ARTCRED",
        9 AS "BIZCRED",
        14 AS "HUMCRED",
        16 AS "NATCRED",
        13 AS "TEKCRED",
        11 AS "GENCRED",
        TO_DATE('01.01.2020', 'dd.mm.yyyy') AS "EFFECTIVE_DATE"
    FROM DUAL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
        5002 AS "ID",
        10.5 AS "ARTCRED",
        6 AS "BIZCRED",
        5 AS "HUMCRED",
        4 AS "NATCRED",
        6 AS "TEKCRED",
        3 AS "GENCRED",
        TO_DATE('01.01.2015', 'dd.mm.yyyy') AS "EFFECTIVE_DATE"
    FROM DUAL
),

"grp_choices" AS (
    SELECT
        5001 AS "ID",
        'ART' AS "GROUPCHOICE",
        TO_DATE('03.03.2010', 'dd.mm.yyyy') AS "DATECHOICE"
    FROM DUAL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
        5001 AS "ID",
        'BIZ' AS "GROUPCHOICE",
        TO_DATE('05.05.2015', 'dd.mm.yyyy') AS "DATECHOICE"
    FROM DUAL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
        5001 AS "ID",
        'NAT' AS "GROUPCHOICE",
        TO_DATE('23.06.2022', 'dd.mm.yyyy') AS "DATECHOICE"
    FROM DUAL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
        5002 AS "ID",
        'ART' AS "GROUPCHOICE",
        TO_DATE('23.06.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy') AS "DATECHOICE"
    FROM DUAL
),

"latest_credits" AS (
    SELECT

        C."BIZCRED",
        C."HUMCRED",
        C."NATCRED",
        C."TEKCRED",
        C."GENCRED",
        C."EFFECTIVE_DATE",
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY C."ID" ORDER BY C."EFFECTIVE_DATE" DESC) AS RN

SELECT
    G."ID",

    CASE G."GROUPCHOICE"
        WHEN 'ART' THEN LC."ARTCRED"
        WHEN 'BIZ' THEN LC."BIZCRED"

        WHEN 'NAT' THEN LC."NATCRED"

WITH match_stats AS (
    SELECT
        "m"."date" AS "match_date",
        "l"."name" AS "league_name",
        "c"."name" AS "country_name",
        "ht"."team_long_name" AS "home_team",
        "at"."team_long_name" AS "away_team",
        "m"."home_team_goal" AS "home_team_goals",
        "m"."away_team_goal" AS "away_team_goals",
        RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY "m"."league_id", "m"."season"
                     ORDER BY "m"."home_team_goal" + "m"."away_team_goal" DESC) AS "high_scoring_rank"
    FROM "Match" "m"
    INNER JOIN "League" "l" ON "m"."league_id" = "l"."id"
    INNER JOIN "Country" "c" ON "m"."country_id" = "c"."id"
    INNER JOIN "Team" "ht" ON "m"."home_team_api_id" = "ht"."team_api_id"
    INNER JOIN "Team" "at" ON "m"."away_team_api_id" = "at"."team_api_id"
),
team_performance AS (
    SELECT
        "team_long_name",
        COUNT(*) AS "total_matches",
        SUM(CASE WHEN "home_team" = "team_long_name" THEN "home_team_goals" ELSE "away_team_goals" END) AS "goals_scored",
        AVG(CASE WHEN "home_team" = "team_long_name" THEN "home_team_goals" ELSE "away_team_goals" END) AS "avg_goals_per_match"
    FROM (
        SELECT
            "match_date", "home_team", "away_team", "home_team_goals", "away_team_goals",
            "home_team" AS "team_long_name"
        FROM match_stats
        UNION ALL
        SELECT
            "match_date", "home_team", "away_team", "home_team_goals", "away_team_goals",
            "away_team" AS "team_long_name"
        FROM match_stats
    )
    GROUP BY "team_long_name"
)
SELECT
    ms."match_date",
    ms."league_name",
    ms."country_name",
    ms."home_team",
    ms."away_team",
    ms."home_team_goals",
    ms."away_team_goals",
    ms."high_scoring_rank",
    htp."avg_goals_per_match" AS "home_team_avg_goals",
    atp."avg_goals_per_match" AS "away_team_avg_goals"
FROM match_stats ms
LEFT JOIN team_performance htp ON ms."home_team" = htp."team_long_name"
LEFT JOIN team_performance atp ON ms."away_team" = atp."team_long_name"
WHERE ms."high_scoring_rank" <= 10
ORDER BY ms."match_date" DESC

   UNION ALL SELECT '1111' AS "TECHNICAL_ID",

   FROM DUAL

   FROM DUAL

   FROM DUAL

                    'FWDNOTLCR' AS "ASSET_TYPE",

   FROM DUAL
   UNION ALL SELECT 'SW' AS "APPLICATION",
                    'FWDNOTLDR' AS "ASSET_TYPE",
                    2 AS "PRIORITY"
   FROM DUAL
   UNION ALL SELECT 'SW' AS "APPLICATION",
                    'SWOFFBALCR' AS "ASSET_TYPE",

   FROM DUAL
   UNION ALL SELECT 'SW' AS "APPLICATION",
                    'SWOFFBALDR' AS "ASSET_TYPE",

   FROM DUAL
   UNION ALL SELECT 'SW' AS "APPLICATION",

   FROM DUAL

WITH match_dates AS (
    SELECT m."country_id",
           m."date",
           m."league_id",
           m."season",
           DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY m."country_id" ORDER BY m."date" DESC) AS match_rank
    FROM "Match" m
    WHERE m."date" IS NOT NULL
),
country_stats AS (
    SELECT c."id" AS country_id,
           c."name" AS country_name,
           COUNT(DISTINCT m."league_id") AS league_count,
           COUNT(DISTINCT m."season") AS season_count
    FROM "Country" c
    LEFT JOIN "Match" m ON c."id" = m."country_id"
    GROUP BY c."id", c."name"
),
match_summary AS (
    SELECT md."country_id",
           md."date",
           md.match_rank,
           LISTAGG(l."name", ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY l."name") AS leagues_played
    FROM match_dates md
    JOIN "League" l ON md."league_id" = l."id"
    WHERE md.match_rank <= 2
    GROUP BY md."country_id", md."date", md.match_rank
)
SELECT cs.country_id,
       cs.country_name,
       MAX(CASE WHEN ms.match_rank = 1 THEN ms."date" END) AS last_match_date,
       MAX(CASE WHEN ms.match_rank = 1 THEN ms.leagues_played END) AS last_match_leagues,
       MAX(CASE WHEN ms.match_rank = 2 THEN ms."date" END) AS prev_match_date,
       MAX(CASE WHEN ms.match_rank = 2 THEN ms.leagues_played END) AS prev_match_leagues,
       cs.league_count,
       cs.season_count
FROM country_stats cs
LEFT JOIN match_summary ms ON cs.country_id = ms."country_id"
GROUP BY cs.country_id, cs.country_name, cs.league_count, cs.season_count
HAVING MAX(CASE WHEN ms.match_rank = 1 THEN ms."date" END) IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY MAX(CASE WHEN ms.match_rank = 1 THEN ms."date" END) DESC

WITH atom_elements AS (
    SELECT a.atom_id,
           a.molecule_id,
           a.element,
           RANK() OVER(PARTITION BY a.molecule_id ORDER BY a.atom_id) AS element_rank
    FROM atom a
),
bond_details AS (
    SELECT b.bond_id,
           b.molecule_id,
           b.bond_type,
           DENSE_RANK() OVER(PARTITION BY b.molecule_id ORDER BY b.bond_id) AS bond_rank
    FROM bond b
)
SELECT ae.atom_id,
       ae.molecule_id,
       ae.element,
       c.bond_id,
       CASE
           WHEN bd.bond_type IS NULL THEN 'Unknown'
           ELSE bd.bond_type
       END AS bond_type
FROM atom_elements ae
LEFT JOIN connected c ON ae.atom_id = c.atom_id
LEFT JOIN bond_details bd ON c.bond_id = bd.bond_id
                         AND ae.molecule_id = bd.molecule_id
                         AND ae.element_rank = bd.bond_rank
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM molecule m
    WHERE m.molecule_id = ae.molecule_id
    AND m.label IS NOT NULL
)
ORDER BY ae.atom_id

SELECT "m"."id",
       "m"."home_team_api_id",
       "m"."away_team_api_id",
       "m"."home_team_goal",
       "m"."away_team_goal",
       SUM(CASE
               WHEN "m"."home_team_api_id" = "t"."team_api_id" THEN "m"."home_team_goal" - "m"."away_team_goal"
               ELSE "m"."away_team_goal" - "m"."home_team_goal"
           END) OVER (PARTITION BY "t"."team_api_id"
                      ORDER BY "m"."id") AS "goal_difference"
FROM "Match" "m"
INNER JOIN "Team" "t" ON "m"."home_team_api_id" = "t"."team_api_id"
   OR "m"."away_team_api_id" = "t"."team_api_id"
WHERE "m"."date" = DATE '2008-11-22'
ORDER BY "t"."team_api_id",
         "m"."id"

WITH atom_stats AS (
    SELECT
        a.molecule_id,
        COUNT(a.atom_id) AS atom_count,
        LISTAGG(a.element, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY a.atom_id) AS elements
    FROM atom a
    GROUP BY a.molecule_id
),
bond_hierarchy AS (
    SELECT
        bond_id,
        molecule_id,
        bond_type,
        REGEXP_SUBSTR(bond_id, '[^_]+', 1, 1) AS molecule_prefix,
        TO_NUMBER(REGEXP_SUBSTR(bond_id, '[^_]+', 1, 2)) AS first_atom_num,
        TO_NUMBER(REGEXP_SUBSTR(bond_id, '[^_]+', 1, 3)) AS second_atom_num
    FROM bond
),
molecule_connectivity AS (
    SELECT
        m.molecule_id,
        m.label,
        COUNT(DISTINCT c.atom_id) AS connected_atoms,
        COUNT(DISTINCT c.bond_id) AS bond_count,
        CASE
            WHEN m.label = '+' THEN 'Positive'
            WHEN m.label = '-' THEN 'Negative'
            ELSE 'Neutral'
        END AS charge_type
    FROM molecule m
    LEFT JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
    LEFT JOIN connected c ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id
    GROUP BY m.molecule_id, m.label
)
SELECT
    m.molecule_id,
    m.label,
    a.atom_id,
    a.element,
    b.bond_id,
    b.bond_type,
    ast.atom_count,
    ast.elements,
    bh.first_atom_num + bh.second_atom_num AS atom_sum,
    mc.connected_atoms,
    mc.charge_type,
    RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY m.molecule_id ORDER BY a.atom_id) AS atom_rank,
    DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY m.molecule_id ORDER BY b.bond_type) AS bond_type_rank
FROM molecule m
INNER JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
INNER JOIN connected c ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id
INNER JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
LEFT JOIN atom_stats ast ON m.molecule_id = ast.molecule_id
LEFT JOIN bond_hierarchy bh ON b.bond_id = bh.bond_id
LEFT JOIN molecule_connectivity mc ON m.molecule_id = mc.molecule_id
WHERE a.element IN (SELECT DISTINCT element FROM atom WHERE molecule_id LIKE 'TR%')
  AND b.bond_type IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY
    m.molecule_id,
    atom_rank,
    bh.first_atom_num

SELECT T."team_long_name",

SELECT "valid_from",
       "valid_until",
       "count"
FROM
  (SELECT "dt" AS "valid_from",
          LEAD("dt") OVER (
                           ORDER BY "dt") - INTERVAL '1' SECOND AS "valid_until",
          SUM("count" * "type") OVER (
                                      ORDER BY "dt") AS "count"
   FROM
     (SELECT "valid_from",
             "valid_until" + INTERVAL '1' DAY AS "valid_until",
             1 AS "count",
             1 AS "type"
      FROM
        (SELECT TO_DATE('2014-01-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "valid_from",
                TO_DATE('2014-01-31', 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "valid_until"
         FROM "CALIFORNIA_SCHOOLS"."schools"
         UNION ALL SELECT TO_DATE('2014-02-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "valid_from",
                          TO_DATE('2014-02-28', 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "valid_until"
         FROM "CALIFORNIA_SCHOOLS"."schools"))
   WHERE "valid_from" <= "valid_until"
      OR "valid_until" IS NULL)
WHERE "count" > 0
  AND ("valid_from" <= "valid_until"
       OR "valid_until" IS NULL)

SELECT "m"."molecule_id",
       "m"."label",
       "a"."atom_id",
       "a"."element",
       "c"."atom_id2",
       "b"."bond_id",
       "b"."bond_type"
FROM "molecule" "m"
INNER JOIN "atom" "a" ON "m"."molecule_id" = "a"."molecule_id"
INNER JOIN "connected" "c" ON "a"."atom_id" = "c"."atom_id"
INNER JOIN "bond" "b" ON "c"."bond_id" = "b"."bond_id"
ORDER BY "m"."molecule_id",
         "a"."atom_id",
         "c"."atom_id2"

WITH school_data AS (
  SELECT
    s."CDSCode" AS "pk",
    CASE
      WHEN s."Charter" = 1 THEN 'Charter'
      WHEN s."Magnet" = 1 THEN 'Magnet'
      ELSE 'Regular'
    END AS "col2",
    SUBSTR(s."County", 1, INSTR(s."County", ' ') - 1) AS "col3",
    TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(s."LastUpdate", 'YYYY/MM/DD') || ' ' ||
           LPAD(MOD(ROWNUM, 24), 2, '0') || ':' ||
           LPAD(MOD(ROWNUM * 7, 60), 2, '0'),
           'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI') AS "col4"
  FROM "schools" s
  WHERE s."StatusType" = 'Active'
    AND s."LastUpdate" IS NOT NULL
),
filtered_data AS (
  SELECT
    sd."pk",
    sd."col2",
    sd."col3",
    sd."col4"
  FROM school_data sd
  WHERE sd."col4" >= TO_DATE('2024/09/04 00:00', 'yyyy/mm/dd hh24:mi')
    AND sd."col4" < TO_DATE('2024/09/04 00:05', 'yyyy/mm/dd hh24:mi')
),
aggregated_data AS (
  SELECT
    fd."col2",
    LISTAGG(DISTINCT fd."col3", ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY fd."col3") AS "col3_list"
  FROM filtered_data fd
  GROUP BY fd."col2"
)
SELECT
  ad."col2",
  ad."col3_list" AS "col3",
  COUNT(fd."pk") AS "record_count"
FROM aggregated_data ad
JOIN filtered_data fd ON fd."col2" = ad."col2"
GROUP BY ad."col2", ad."col3_list"
ORDER BY "record_count" DESC

SELECT "molecule"."molecule_id",
       "molecule"."label",
       "atom"."atom_id",
       "atom"."element",
       "bond"."bond_id",
       "bond"."bond_type",
       "connected"."atom_id2"
FROM "molecule"
INNER JOIN "atom" ON "molecule"."molecule_id" = "atom"."molecule_id"
INNER JOIN "connected" ON "atom"."atom_id" = "connected"."atom_id"
INNER JOIN "bond" ON "connected"."bond_id" = "bond"."bond_id"
ORDER BY "molecule"."molecule_id",
         "atom"."atom_id",
         "connected"."atom_id2",
         "bond"."bond_type"

WITH atom_elements AS (
    SELECT
        a.atom_id,
        a.molecule_id,
        a.element,
        RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY a.molecule_id ORDER BY a.atom_id) AS element_rank
    FROM atom a
),
bond_details AS (
    SELECT
        b.bond_id,
        b.molecule_id,
        b.bond_type,
        DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY b.molecule_id ORDER BY b.bond_id) AS bond_rank
    FROM bond b
),
molecule_connections AS (
    SELECT
        c.atom_id,
        c.atom_id2,
        c.bond_id,
        LISTAGG(c.atom_id2, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY c.atom_id2) OVER (PARTITION BY c.atom_id) AS connected_atoms
    FROM connected c
)
SELECT
    m.molecule_id,
    m.label,
    ae.atom_id,
    ae.element,
    bd.bond_id,
    bd.bond_type,
    mc.connected_atoms
FROM molecule m
LEFT JOIN atom_elements ae ON m.molecule_id = ae.molecule_id
LEFT JOIN molecule_connections mc ON ae.atom_id = mc.atom_id
LEFT JOIN bond_details bd ON mc.bond_id = bd.bond_id
WHERE ae.element_rank <= 10
  AND bd.bond_rank <= 5
  AND (m.label IS NULL OR m.label IN ('+', '-'))
GROUP BY
    m.molecule_id,
    m.label,
    ae.atom_id,
    ae.element,
    bd.bond_id,
    bd.bond_type,
    mc.connected_atoms
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT mc.atom_id2) > 0
ORDER BY
    m.molecule_id,
    ae.atom_id,
    bd.bond_id

SELECT m."molecule_id",
       COUNT(a."atom_id") / COUNT(DISTINCT b."bond_id") AS result
FROM "molecule" m
INNER JOIN "atom" a ON m."molecule_id" = a."molecule_id"
INNER JOIN "connected" c ON a."atom_id" = c."atom_id"
INNER JOIN "bond" b ON c."bond_id" = b."bond_id"
GROUP BY m."molecule_id"

WITH atom_counts AS (
    SELECT
        a.molecule_id,
        COUNT(DISTINCT a.atom_id) AS atom_count
    FROM atom a
    GROUP BY a.molecule_id
),
bond_counts AS (
    SELECT
        b.molecule_id,
        COUNT(DISTINCT b.bond_id) AS bond_count
    FROM bond b
    GROUP BY b.molecule_id
)
SELECT
    m.molecule_id AS ID,
    COALESCE(ac.atom_count, 0) AS QTY,
    COALESCE(bc.bond_count, 0) AS VALUE
FROM molecule m
LEFT JOIN atom_counts ac ON m.molecule_id = ac.molecule_id
LEFT JOIN bond_counts bc ON m.molecule_id = bc.molecule_id

WITH atom_data AS (
    SELECT
        a.atom_id,
        a.molecule_id,
        CASE
            WHEN a.element = 'cl' THEN UPPER(a.element)
            ELSE a.element
        END AS element
    FROM atom a
),
bond_data AS (
    SELECT
        b.bond_id,
        b.molecule_id,
        CASE
            WHEN b.bond_type = '-' THEN 'single'
            WHEN b.bond_type = '=' THEN 'double'
            WHEN b.bond_type = '#' THEN 'triple'
            ELSE b.bond_type
        END AS bond_type
    FROM bond b
),
molecule_elements AS (
    SELECT
        m.molecule_id,
        LISTAGG(a.element, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY a.atom_id) AS elements
    FROM molecule m
    LEFT JOIN atom_data a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
    GROUP BY m.molecule_id
)
SELECT
    COALESCE(a.atom_id, b.bond_id) AS "id",
    COALESCE(a.molecule_id, b.molecule_id) AS "molecule_id",
    COALESCE(a.element, b.bond_type) AS "val",
    me.elements AS molecule_composition
FROM atom_data a
FULL OUTER JOIN bond_data b ON a.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
LEFT JOIN molecule_elements me ON COALESCE(a.molecule_id, b.molecule_id) = me.molecule_id
WHERE (a.atom_id IS NOT NULL OR b.bond_id IS NOT NULL)
  AND (
      me.elements LIKE '%cl%'
      OR me.elements IS NULL
      OR REGEXP_LIKE(COALESCE(a.element, b.bond_type), '^[a-z]+$')
  )
ORDER BY
    CASE
        WHEN a.atom_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1
        ELSE 2
    END,
    "id",
    "molecule_id"

WITH RECURSIVE molecule_hierarchy AS (

SELECT
        m.molecule_id,
        m.label,
        a.atom_id,
        a.element,
        CAST(NULL AS NVARCHAR2(512)) AS atom_id2,
        CAST(NULL AS NVARCHAR2(512)) AS bond_id,
        CAST(NULL AS NCLOB) AS bond_type,
        1 AS level,
        CAST(a.atom_id AS NVARCHAR2(4000)) AS path
    FROM molecule m
    JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id

    UNION ALL


SELECT
        h.molecule_id,
        h.label,
        h.atom_id,
        h.element,
        c.atom_id2,
        c.bond_id,
        b.bond_type,
        h.level + 1,
        h.path || '->' || c.atom_id2
    FROM molecule_hierarchy h
    JOIN connected c ON h.atom_id = c.atom_id
    LEFT JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
    WHERE h.level < 3
AND INSTR(h.path, c.atom_id2) = 0
),
pivoted_elements AS (
    SELECT
        molecule_id,
        MAX(DECODE(rn, 1, element)) AS element1,
        MAX(DECODE(rn, 2, element)) AS element2,
        MAX(DECODE(rn, 3, element)) AS element3
    FROM (
        SELECT
            molecule_id,
            element,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY molecule_id ORDER BY atom_id) AS rn
        FROM atom
    ) sub
    GROUP BY molecule_id
)

SELECT
    m.molecule_id,
    m.label,
    a.atom_id,
    JSON_OBJECT(
        'element' VALUE a.element,
        'connected_atoms' VALUE (
            SELECT JSON_ARRAYAGG(
                JSON_OBJECT(
                    'atom_id' VALUE c.atom_id2,
                    'bond_type' VALUE b.bond_type
                )
                ORDER BY c.atom_id2
            )
            FROM connected c
            LEFT JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
            WHERE c.atom_id = a.atom_id
        )
    ) AS atom_details,
    c.atom_id2,
    b.bond_id,
    b.bond_type,
    pe.element1,
    pe.element2,
    pe.element3,
    LISTAGG(a.element, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY a.atom_id) OVER (PARTITION BY m.molecule_id) AS elements_list
FROM molecule m
JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
LEFT JOIN connected c ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id
LEFT JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id AND m.molecule_id = SUBSTR(b.bond_id, 1, INSTR(b.bond_id, '_') - 1)
LEFT JOIN pivoted_elements pe ON m.molecule_id = pe.molecule_id
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM molecule_hierarchy mh
    WHERE mh.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
    AND mh.level > 1
)
ORDER BY m.molecule_id, a.atom_id, c.atom_id2

WITH replacements ("molecule_id", "label", "spos") AS (

         "label",
         REGEXP_INSTR("label", '\+', 1, 1, 1)
  FROM "molecule"
  UNION ALL
  SELECT "molecule_id",
         SUBSTR("label", 1, "spos" - 1) || '-' || SUBSTR("label", "spos" + 1),
         REGEXP_INSTR("label", '\+', "spos" + 1, 1, 1)
  FROM replacements
  WHERE "spos" > 0
)
SELECT "molecule_id",
       "label"
FROM replacements
WHERE "spos" = 0

WITH molecule_stats AS (
    SELECT
        m."molecule_id",
        m."label",
        COUNT(DISTINCT a."atom_id") AS atom_count,
        COUNT(DISTINCT b."bond_id") AS bond_count
    FROM "molecule" m
    LEFT JOIN "atom" a ON m."molecule_id" = a."molecule_id"
    LEFT JOIN "connected" c ON a."atom_id" = c."atom_id"
    LEFT JOIN "bond" b ON c."bond_id" = b."bond_id" AND b."molecule_id" = m."molecule_id"
    GROUP BY m."molecule_id", m."label"
),
atom_details AS (
    SELECT
        a."molecule_id",
        a."atom_id",
        a."element",
        LISTAGG(c."atom_id2", ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY c."atom_id2") AS connected_atoms,
        COUNT(DISTINCT c."bond_id") AS bonds_per_atom
    FROM "atom" a
    LEFT JOIN "connected" c ON a."atom_id" = c."atom_id"
    GROUP BY a."molecule_id", a."atom_id", a."element"
)
SELECT
    ms."molecule_id",
    ms."label",
    ad."atom_id",
    ad."element",
    c."bond_id",
    b."bond_type",
    ms.atom_count,
    ms.bond_count,
    ad.connected_atoms,
    ad.bonds_per_atom
FROM molecule_stats ms
JOIN atom_details ad ON ms."molecule_id" = ad."molecule_id"
LEFT JOIN "connected" c ON ad."atom_id" = c."atom_id"
LEFT JOIN "bond" b ON c."bond_id" = b."bond_id"
WHERE ms.atom_count > 0
  AND (ad.bonds_per_atom > 0 OR c."bond_id" IS NOT NULL)
ORDER BY
    CASE WHEN ms."label" = '+' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,
    ms."molecule_id",
    ad."atom_id",
    c."bond_id"

WITH molecule_pairs AS (
    SELECT
        CASE
            WHEN INSTR(pair_str, ',') > 0
            THEN TRIM(SUBSTR(pair_str, 1, INSTR(pair_str, ',') - 1))
            ELSE pair_str
        END AS mol_id1,
        CASE
            WHEN INSTR(pair_str, ',') > 0
            THEN TRIM(SUBSTR(pair_str, INSTR(pair_str, ',') + 1))
            ELSE NULL
        END AS mol_id2
    FROM (
        SELECT 'TR427, TR430' AS pair_str FROM DUAL
        UNION ALL
        SELECT 'TR427, TR431' FROM DUAL
        UNION ALL
        SELECT 'TR430, TR431' FROM DUAL
    )
),
molecule_stats AS (
    SELECT
        m."molecule_id",
        m."label",
        COUNT(a."atom_id") OVER(PARTITION BY m."molecule_id") AS atom_count,
        COUNT(DISTINCT b."bond_id") OVER(PARTITION BY m."molecule_id") AS bond_count,
        LISTAGG(a."element", ',') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY a."element")
            OVER(PARTITION BY m."molecule_id") AS elements
    FROM "molecule" m
    LEFT JOIN "atom" a ON m."molecule_id" = a."molecule_id"
    LEFT JOIN "bond" b ON m."molecule_id" = b."molecule_id"
)
SELECT
    m1."molecule_id" AS molecule_id1,
    m1."label" AS label1,
    m1.atom_count,
    m1.elements,
    m2."molecule_id" AS molecule_id2,
    m2."label" AS label2,
    m2.atom_count,
    m2.elements,
    CASE
        WHEN m1.bond_count > 0 AND m2.bond_count > 0
        THEN 'Both have bonds'
        WHEN m1.bond_count > 0
        THEN 'Only ' || m1."molecule_id" || ' has bonds'
        WHEN m2.bond_count > 0
        THEN 'Only ' || m2."molecule_id" || ' has bonds'
        ELSE 'Neither has bonds'
    END AS bond_status
FROM molecule_stats m1
JOIN molecule_pairs mp ON m1."molecule_id" = mp.mol_id1
JOIN molecule_stats m2 ON m2."molecule_id" = mp.mol_id2
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM "connected" c1
    JOIN "connected" c2 ON c1."bond_id" = c2."bond_id"
    WHERE c1."atom_id" LIKE m1."molecule_id" || '%'
    AND c2."atom_id" LIKE m2."molecule_id" || '%'
)
ORDER BY
    m1."molecule_id",
    m2."molecule_id"

SELECT "m"."molecule_id",
       "m"."label",
       "a"."atom_id",
       "a"."element",
       "b"."bond_id",
       "b"."bond_type",
       "c"."atom_id2"
FROM "molecule" "m"
INNER JOIN "atom" "a" ON "m"."molecule_id" = "a"."molecule_id"
INNER JOIN "connected" "c" ON "a"."atom_id" = "c"."atom_id"
INNER JOIN "bond" "b" ON "c"."bond_id" = "b"."bond_id" AND "a"."molecule_id" = "b"."molecule_id"
ORDER BY "m"."molecule_id",
         "a"."atom_id",
         "b"."bond_type"

WITH string1_tab AS (
    SELECT REGEXP_SUBSTR('24,36,78,98', '[^,]+', 1, level) AS value
    FROM dual
    CONNECT BY level <= LENGTH('24,36,78,98') - LENGTH(REPLACE('24,36,78,98', ',')) + 1
),
string2_tab AS (
    SELECT REGEXP_SUBSTR('25,36,88,98', '[^,]+', 1, level) AS value
    FROM dual
    CONNECT BY level <= LENGTH('25,36,88,98') - LENGTH(REPLACE('25,36,88,98', ',')) + 1
),
string1_parsed AS (
    SELECT TO_NUMBER(TRIM(value)) AS num_value
    FROM string1_tab
),
string2_parsed AS (
    SELECT TO_NUMBER(TRIM(value)) AS num_value
    FROM string2_tab
),
common_values AS (
    SELECT s1.num_value
    FROM string1_parsed s1
    JOIN string2_parsed s2 ON s1.num_value = s2.num_value
)
SELECT LISTAGG(num_value, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY num_value) AS common_values
FROM common_values

WITH t AS
  (SELECT "date",
          "match_api_id" AS code,
          TRUNC(SYSDATE) - TRUNC("date") AS duration,
          COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY TRUNC("date"), "match_api_id", TRUNC(SYSDATE) - TRUNC("date")) AS cnt,
          MIN(TRUNC(SYSDATE) - TRUNC("date")) OVER (PARTITION BY TRUNC("date"), "match_api_id") AS min_dur
   FROM "Match")
SELECT t."date",
       t.code,
       t.duration,
       CASE
           WHEN t.min_dur = 0
                OR MAX(t.cnt) OVER (PARTITION BY t."date", t.code) > 1 THEN 'Y'
           ELSE 'N'
       END AS flg
FROM t
WHERE t."date" = TO_DATE('2008-11-22 00:00:00', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')

INNER JOIN "atom" "a" ON "m"."molecule_id" = "a"."molecule_id"

         "a"."atom_id"

CROSS JOIN

WITH molecule_stats AS (
    SELECT
        m."molecule_id",
        COUNT(DISTINCT a."atom_id") AS atom_count,
        COUNT(DISTINCT b."bond_id") AS bond_count,
        LISTAGG(DISTINCT a."element", ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY a."element") AS elements
    FROM "molecule" m
    LEFT OUTER JOIN "atom" a ON m."molecule_id" = a."molecule_id"
    LEFT OUTER JOIN "connected" c ON a."atom_id" = c."atom_id"
    LEFT OUTER JOIN "bond" b ON c."bond_id" = b."bond_id"
    GROUP BY m."molecule_id"
),
molecule_pivot AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM (
        SELECT
            m."molecule_id",
            a."element",
            COUNT(*) AS element_count
        FROM "molecule" m
        JOIN "atom" a ON m."molecule_id" = a."molecule_id"
        GROUP BY m."molecule_id", a."element"
    )
    PIVOT (
        SUM(element_count)
        FOR element IN ('cl' AS chlorine, 'c' AS carbon, 'h' AS hydrogen, 'o' AS oxygen, 'n' AS nitrogen)
    )
)
SELECT
    m."molecule_id",
    m."label",
    a."atom_id",
    a."element",
    b."bond_id",
    b."bond_type",
    ms.atom_count,
    ms.bond_count,
    ms.elements,
    mp.chlorine,
    mp.carbon,
    mp.hydrogen,
    mp.oxygen,
    mp.nitrogen,
    RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY m."molecule_id" ORDER BY a."atom_id") AS atom_rank,
    DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY m."molecule_id" ORDER BY b."bond_type") AS bond_type_rank,
    CASE
        WHEN a."element" = 'cl' THEN 'Chlorine'
        WHEN a."element" = 'c' THEN 'Carbon'
        WHEN a."element" = 'h' THEN 'Hydrogen'
        WHEN a."element" = 'o' THEN 'Oxygen'
        WHEN a."element" = 'n' THEN 'Nitrogen'
        ELSE a."element"
    END AS element_name
FROM "molecule" m
LEFT OUTER JOIN "atom" a ON m."molecule_id" = a."molecule_id"
LEFT OUTER JOIN "connected" c ON a."atom_id" = c."atom_id"
LEFT OUTER JOIN "bond" b ON c."bond_id" = b."bond_id"
LEFT OUTER JOIN molecule_stats ms ON m."molecule_id" = ms."molecule_id"
LEFT OUTER JOIN molecule_pivot mp ON m."molecule_id" = mp."molecule_id"
ORDER BY
    m."molecule_id",
    a."atom_id",
    b."bond_id"

WITH molecule_stats AS (
    SELECT m."molecule_id",
           COUNT(a."atom_id") AS atom_count,
           LISTAGG(a."element", ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY a."atom_id") AS elements
    FROM "molecule" m
    LEFT JOIN "atom" a ON m."molecule_id" = a."molecule_id"
    GROUP BY m."molecule_id"
),
bond_stats AS (
    SELECT b."molecule_id",
           COUNT(b."bond_id") AS bond_count
    FROM "bond" b
    GROUP BY b."molecule_id"
)
SELECT ms."molecule_id",
       ms.atom_count AS "total_atoms",
       bs.bond_count,
       CASE
           WHEN ms.atom_count > 0 THEN
               ROUND(bs.bond_count / ms.atom_count, 2)
           ELSE 0
       END AS bonds_per_atom,
       ms.elements
FROM molecule_stats ms
LEFT JOIN bond_stats bs ON ms."molecule_id" = bs."molecule_id"
WHERE ms.elements LIKE '%cl%' AND ms.atom_count > 0
ORDER BY ms."molecule_id"

WITH team_speed_stats AS (
    SELECT
        "team_api_id",
        "date",
        "buildUpPlaySpeed",
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY "team_api_id" ORDER BY "date" DESC) as rn,
        AVG("buildUpPlaySpeed") OVER (PARTITION BY "buildUpPlaySpeedClass") as class_avg_speed
    FROM "Team_Attributes"
),
match_details AS (
    SELECT
        "m"."id",
        "m"."date",
        "m"."home_team_api_id",
        "m"."away_team_api_id",
        "m"."home_team_goal",
        "m"."away_team_goal",
        "t"."team_long_name" as home_team_name,
        "t2"."team_long_name" as away_team_name,
        "ta"."buildUpPlaySpeed" as home_speed,
        "ta"."buildUpPlaySpeedClass" as home_speed_class,
        "ta_away"."buildUpPlaySpeed" as away_speed,
        "ts"."class_avg_speed",
        (SELECT AVG("buildUpPlaySpeed") FROM "Team_Attributes") as overall_avg_speed
    FROM "Match" "m"
    JOIN "Team" "t" ON "m"."home_team_api_id" = "t"."team_api_id"
    JOIN "Team" "t2" ON "m"."away_team_api_id" = "t2"."team_api_id"
    JOIN "Team_Attributes" "ta" ON "m"."home_team_api_id" = "ta"."team_api_id"
    LEFT JOIN "Team_Attributes" "ta_away" ON "m"."away_team_api_id" = "ta_away"."team_api_id"
        AND "ta_away"."date" <= "m"."date"
    JOIN team_speed_stats "ts" ON "ta"."team_api_id" = "ts"."team_api_id"
        AND "ta"."buildUpPlaySpeed" = "ts"."buildUpPlaySpeed"
        AND "ts"."rn" = 1
    WHERE "m"."date" BETWEEN TO_DATE('2015-01-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE('2016-01-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
)
SELECT
    "id",
    "date",
    "home_team_api_id",
    "away_team_api_id",
    "home_team_goal",
    "away_team_goal",
    "home_team_name",
    "away_team_name",
    "home_speed",
    "home_speed_class",
    "away_speed",
    CASE
        WHEN "home_speed" > "class_avg_speed" THEN 'Above Class Average'
        ELSE 'Below Class Average'
    END as speed_comparison
FROM match_details
WHERE "home_speed" > "overall_avg_speed"
ORDER BY "home_team_goal" DESC, "away_team_goal" ASC

with lose_agg as
  (select "team_api_id",
          sum(case
                  when to_number(to_char("date", 'YYYY')) = 2011 then "defencePressure"
              end) as lose_5,
          sum(case
                  when to_number(to_char("date", 'YYYY')) = 2012 then "defencePressure"
              end) as lose_10
   from "Team_Attributes"
   group by "team_api_id"),
     profit_agg as
  (select "team_api_id",
          sum(case
                  when to_number(to_char("date", 'YYYY')) = 2011 then "buildUpPlaySpeed"
              end) as profit_5,
          sum(case
                  when to_number(to_char("date", 'YYYY')) = 2012 then "buildUpPlaySpeed"
              end) as profit_10
   from "Team_Attributes"
   group by "team_api_id")
select l.lose_5,
       p.profit_5,
       l.lose_10,
       p.profit_10,
       coalesce(p."team_api_id", l."team_api_id") as "team_api_id"
from lose_agg l
full outer join profit_agg p on l."team_api_id" = p."team_api_id"
order by coalesce(p."team_api_id", l."team_api_id")
